title: Fabrication Gerber package is present

evidence.description: Gerber archive or individual Gerber layer files in the release package

message: No Gerber archive or Gerber layer files were found for fabrication review.
recommendation: Export the PCB fabrication Gerbers and include them with the order package.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive only when this run is intentionally source-only and not used for ordering.
impact: Manufacturer quote or fabrication upload may fail before order placement.

title: BOM and CPL reference designators match

evidence.description: Reference designators present in BOM but missing in CPL, or present in CPL but missing in BOM

message: BOM and pick-and-place reference designators do not reconcile.
recommendation: Regenerate BOM and CPL from the same KiCad revision, then confirm DNP parts are intentionally excluded.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive only for explicitly documented hand-placed or intentionally omitted parts.
impact: Assembly house may place the wrong part set or pause the order for clarification.

title: NC drill output is present

evidence.description: NC drill file used for plated and non-plated hole review

message: No NC drill file was found.
recommendation: Export drill files and verify plated, non-plated, slot and map settings before ordering.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive only for non-PCB inputs or intentionally incomplete source review.
impact: Board fabrication can fail or manufacture an incorrect hole set.

title: CPL includes side and rotation data

evidence.description: Placement rows with missing side or rotation data

message: A placement row is missing assembly side or rotation data.
recommendation: Regenerate the CPL with side and rotation columns, then inspect pin-1 orientation for polarized parts.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive only for hand-placed parts excluded from automated assembly.
impact: Automated assembly review may miss orientation or side-placement mistakes.

title: Manufacturer profile is explicit

evidence.description: Selected manufacturer profile for interpreting fabrication and assembly thresholds

message: The review is using the generic profile, so manufacturer-specific gates are not explainable.
recommendation: Run with --profile jlcpcb or --profile pcbway before treating results as order-ready.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive for early source-only review before a manufacturer has been selected.
impact: Findings cannot be tied to a specific manufacturer order workflow.

title: Fabrication parameters need human confirmation

evidence.description: Board thickness, copper weight, solder mask and finish assumptions

message: Fabrication parameters such as board thickness, copper weight and finish need human confirmation.
recommendation: Confirm the manufacturer order form matches the design intent and quote assumptions.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive when these parameters are captured in an external job file or order checklist.
impact: Silent order-form defaults can change cost, fit or electrical behavior.

title: Assembly drawing or placement preview is present

evidence.description: Assembly drawing, interactive BOM or placement preview for assembly review

message: No assembly drawing or placement preview was found.
recommendation: Include an assembly drawing or interactive BOM to support orientation and side review.
impact: Human assembly review has less evidence for polarity, side and orientation checks.

title: Release revision needs traceability

evidence.description: Release hash, date or revision tag linking BOM/CPL/Gerbers to one source revision

recommendation: Record the source commit or release tag used to generate Gerbers, BOM and CPL.
falsePositiveNotes: Waive when an external release process already records this linkage.
impact: Review results may not be reproducible if files come from different revisions.
